ANALYSIS:
- Benchmark ran for ~19 seconds (19 samples captured before completion)
- Memory usage stable at ~1.5 GiB throughout
- CPU thermal: started 45.4C, peaked 46.0C during throughput test, settled to 45.6C
- Tj-thermal (junction): started 46.3C, peaked 46.8C, settled to 46.8C
- No thermal throttling observed (well below 100C limit)
- GPU thermal stayed ~42.2-42.5C (not used by benchmark)
